note: Curated install facts. Mirror packaging/installer.iss + build.ps1 when they change. Not auto-generated.

editions.label: Full (bundles offline Whisper)
editions.use_when: no cloud account, privacy, fully offline

macos.note: Runs from source or a packaged build; launch-at-startup uses a LaunchAgent. No first-class .pkg today.

update.how: Download the latest installer of the same edition and run it over the existing install.
update.before: Fully quit Bubble Buddy so the exe is not locked.

uninstall.how: Windows Settings > Apps, or the Start-menu uninstaller.
uninstall.leftover_user_data: ~/.copilot-voice-shell is not removed; delete manually for a clean wipe.
